chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-9011 of 2018 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on M.A No.39568/18 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.39569/2018 (Ex/A) 3. For order on M.A. No.39570/2018 (Stay/A) 4. For hearing of Main Case. -------------------------------------------- 02.01.2019. Syed Shoa-un-Nabi, advocate for the petitioner. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. Learned counsel states that the petitioner is in grade-20 and he vide Notification dated 24.10.2017 has been posted as Principal, Government Premier College No.1, North Nazimbad, Karachi but the respondents No.5&6 are making hindrance in this behalf. Learned counsel states that the petitioner has already moved an application to the respondent No.2 in this behalf but no heed was paid, therefore the instant petition has been filed. Learned counsel states that the petitioner would be satisfied and would not press this petition if directions are issued to the respondent No.2 to look into the matter and decide the application filed by the petitioner in accordance with law. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, learned A.A.G present in Court in some other matters waives notice and has no objection for disposal of this petition on the said prayer made by the counsel for the petitioner. Petition stands disposed of along with the listed application, however, the respondent No.2 is directed to take up the matter and decide the application of the petitioner in accordance with law within a period of one month from the date of the receipt of this order.

Ali Safdar Depar, learned A.A.G present in Court in some other matters waives notice and has no objection for disposal of this petition on the said prayer made by the counsel for the petitioner. Petition stands disposed of along with the listed application, however, the respondent No.2 is directed to take up the matter and decide the application of the petitioner in accordance with law within a period of one month from the date of the receipt of this order. Let a copy of this order be sent to the respondent No.2 for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
